title: Design System: The Ground State Society

display.purpose: Wordmark and hero only. Wide heavy Archivo caps (wdth 122%, weight 840).

headline.purpose: Section titles. Wide Archivo caps (wdth 116%, weight 800), ~19ch measure.

title.purpose: Card/subsection headings and display-set pull statements.

body.purpose: Running prose. Archivo normal width, measure capped 56-66ch.

label.purpose: The IBM Plex Mono metadata layer: nav, kickers, captions, data, form labels, button text.

shadows.name: receipt-offset
shadows.purpose: Hard un-blurred powder block behind the ROI receipt — a print-shop second-sheet device, not a depth cue.

shadows.name: selected-plan-ring
shadows.purpose: Inset powder ring marking the chosen plan card as settled (the ground state of selection). Adds no lift.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: The single easing curve for all state transitions and GSAP reveals — exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: el-breathe
motion.purpose: Slow breathing of the fig.03 absorption arrow; the only ambient loop, gated behind no-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button (light ground)
components.description: The primary action on the ghost reading ground — solid black, flips to powder on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1.05rem 1.9rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), translate 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary { background: #08080a; color: #f7f7ff; border-color: #08080a; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c1d8e2; border-color: #c1d8e2; color: #08080a; } .ds-btn:active { translate: 0 1px; } .ds-arrow { transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn:hover .ds-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Ghost Button (light ground)
components.description: Secondary action — transparent with a strong hairline; inverts to solid ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1.05rem 1.9rem; border: 1px solid rgba(67,45,22,0.38); border-radius: 0; background: transparent; color: #432d16; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #432d16; border-color: #432d16; color: #f7f7ff; }

components.name: Dark-Panel CTA (powder on black)
components.description: The primary button as it re-resolves on a .ground-dark panel: powder fill, black label.
components.css: .ds-darkwrap { background: #08080a; padding: 2rem; } .ds-btn-dark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1.05rem 1.9rem; border: 1px solid #c1d8e2; border-radius: 0; background: #c1d8e2; color: #08080a; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-dark:hover { background: #f7f7ff; border-color: #f7f7ff; } .ds-arrow { transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-dark:hover .ds-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field on the ghost ground. Deep cool-grey rest fill, lifts to white on focus, border goes accent-slate. No glow.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.55rem; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(67,45,22,0.82); } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ebedf5; border: 1px solid rgba(67,45,22,0.38); border-radius: 0; padding: 0.9rem 1rem; color: #432d16; font-family: 'Archivo Variable', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(67,45,22,0.68); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #4a6878; background: #ffffff; }

components.name: Section Kicker
components.description: The mono eyebrow + trailing rule that opens every section. Sand/accent emphasis on a hairline.
components.css: .ds-kicker { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.25rem; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(67,45,22,0.82); margin: 0; } .ds-kicker strong { color: #4a6878; font-weight: 500; text-transform: none; } .ds-kicker::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: rgba(67,45,22,0.14); }

components.name: Tier Card (featured)
components.description: A membership tier. Sharp, hairline-bordered, ghost ground; the featured tier carries a black border and lifts -5px on hover. No shadow.
components.html:
The Round

Membership

Funded quantum founders

$300/ month
  • The private network
  • Vetted by application
  • Founding rate
components.css: .ds-tier { display: flex; flex-direction: column; border: 1px solid rgba(67,45,22,0.38); border-radius: 0; background: #f7f7ff; color: #432d16; padding: 1.9rem 1.7rem; transition: translate 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-tier-featured { border-color: #08080a; } .ds-tier:hover { translate: 0 -5px; } .ds-tier-featured:hover { border-color: #c1d8e2; } .ds-tier-flag { display: inline-block; align-self: flex-start; color: #b7a781; border: 1px solid rgba(183,167,129,0.6); padding: 0.25rem 0.55rem; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.9rem; } .ds-tier-name { font-family: 'Archivo Variable', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-stretch: 108%; font-size: 1.45rem; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0; } .ds-tier-aud { margin: 0.45rem 0 0; color: rgba(67,45,22,0.68); font-size: 0.85rem; } .ds-tier-price { font-family: 'Archivo Variable', sans-serif; font-stretch: 116%; font-weight: 820; font-size: 2.4rem; line-height: 1; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 1.1rem 0; } .ds-tier-price small { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.16em; margin-left: 0.6rem; color: rgba(67,45,22,0.68); } .ds-tier-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-tier-list li { padding-block: 0.6rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(67,45,22,0.14); font-size: 0.92rem; color: rgba(67,45,22,0.82); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-bar link with mono sub-glyph; active state carries an accent-slate underline.
components.html: Inside |01⟩Proof |02⟩
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.45rem; padding: 0.4rem 0; text-decoration: none; color: rgba(67,45,22,0.82); font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-link em { font-style: normal; color: #4a6878; font-size: 0.85em; text-transform: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #432d16; } .ds-nav-link.ds-active { color: #432d16; border-bottom-color: #4a6878; }

narrative.overview: The ground state is the lowest-energy, most stable configuration a quantum system can occupy — |0⟩, settled by construction. The interface is built to feel like that state. Energy can be fed in (scroll feeds the hero's particle cloud), but the resting condition is calm: sharp edges, hairline rules, generous silence, nothing vibrating for attention. Where a mass-market page would shout, this one settles. Restraint is not a constraint on the brand; it is the brand, and the audience — funded quantum founders who can read the physics — reads that restraint as confidence and competence. Structurally the system alternates two grounds: ghost editorial sheets (a near-white reading surface for argument and evidence) and black architectural panels (the hero, the Proof data panel, the Final CTA, the footer). Every color flows through semantic tokens that re-resolve per ground, so a single component renders correctly on either without per-component color rules.
keyCharacteristics: Dual-ground architecture: light Ghost sheets and black panels, one token set, AA on both.
Strict 60 / 20 / 10 / 10 palette discipline — Ghost / Powder / Sand / Umber, plus black.
Sharp corners everywhere (0px radius); structure drawn with hairlines, not shadows.
Mono label layer (IBM Plex Mono) against wide architectural Archivo display caps.
Calm at rest; motion is energy fed in, then relaxation back to the ground state.
Receipts, not hype: every number is evidence, presented with documentary restraint.

rules.name: The 60/20/10/10 Rule
rules.body: The palette is rationed: ~60% Ghost, ~20% Powder, ~10% Sand, ~10% Umber, with black as architectural punctuation. Adding a fifth hue or letting any accent creep past its share breaks the discipline that makes the page read as expensive.

rules.name: The Dual-Ground Rule
rules.body: Never hand-set a dark-mode color. Wrap a region in .ground-dark and let the tokens re-resolve. A component that hard-codes #08080a or #f7f7ff instead of var(--bg) / var(--ink) will break on the opposite ground.

rules.name: The Powder-Is-Not-Text-On-Light Rule
rules.body: Raw Powder (#c1d8e2) is a fill and a hairline on the Ghost ground, never text. For accent text on light use Accent Slate (#4a6878) small or Accent Display (#6e8c9e) large. Powder-as-text is reserved for the black panels (13.3:1).

rules.name: The Notation-Is-Meaning Rule
rules.body: Physics notation (ħω, |0⟩, |ψ₀|², α, β, kets) is exempt from every text-transform: uppercase. Case carries scientific meaning; uppercasing it is a factual error to this audience.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Rule
rules.body: Anything that is metadata rather than message — eyebrows, nav items, captions, table headers, form labels, data — is set in IBM Plex Mono, uppercase, wide-tracked. Prose and headlines are Archivo. The two never trade jobs.

rules.name: The Display-Caps Rule
rules.body: Display and headline type is always uppercase Archivo at wdth >= 108% and weight >= 700. Letter-spacing stays slightly positive (>= 0.005em) — the width axis, not negative tracking, supplies the architectural density.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No drop shadows for elevation, ever. If a surface needs to separate from its neighbour, use a hairline, a ground change, or whitespace. A blurred shadow under a card is forbidden.

rules.name: The Grain Rule
rules.body: A single fixed feTurbulence noise layer sits over the whole canvas at 40% opacity, mix-blend-mode soft-light, pointer-transparent. It is the only texture, grounding both surfaces as material. Do not add gradients or glows in its place.

dos: Do ration the palette to 60/20/10/10 (Ghost / Powder / Sand / Umber) plus black. Compose new surfaces from these five only.
Do style through semantic tokens (--bg, --ink, --accent, --line) and wrap dark regions in .ground-dark so they re-resolve. Never hand-set a dark color.
Do keep corners sharp (0px) and draw structure with 1px hairlines.
Do set metadata (eyebrows, captions, data, labels) in IBM Plex Mono uppercase, and headlines/body in Archivo. Keep the two layers in their lanes.
Do leave physics notation in its true case (text-transform: none). Case is meaning.
Do present every claim as a receipt — sourced, exact, documentary. Use Sand for the source/annotation furniture.
Do ship a complete, static page under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce; never gate content behind a reveal.
donts: Don't use mass-market SaaS marketing patterns: no popups, no countdown timers, no fake scarcity, no exclamation points, no emoji.
Don't push cold visitors toward the $300 ask — route them to the free Signal tier. The page persuades by being right for the reader, not by pressure.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text), glassmorphism as decoration, or blurred drop shadows for elevation. Depth is hairlines and ground shifts.
Don't put Powder (#c1d8e2) as text on the Ghost ground — use Accent Slate (#4a6878) small or Accent Display (#6e8c9e) large.
Don't use Sand (#b7a781) as a call-to-action color; it is annotation furniture only.
Don't ship decorative or inaccurate quantum imagery. The figures and the hero scene are physically honest or they don't ship.
Don't invent claims — testimonials, member counts, dollar values. Every number traces to the strategy document; honesty about launch state is a feature.
